info.name: Local Service Marketplace - All Services
info.description:
Complete API documentation for all microservices including the API Gateway.

**Base URL (via API Gateway):** `{{base_url}}` = `http://localhost:3700/api/v1`

**Auth:** Most endpoints require a Bearer JWT token. Use the Login request and the collection will auto-save the token.

**Services & Direct Ports:**
- api-gateway: 3700
- identity-service: 3001
- marketplace-service: 3003
- payment-service: 3006
- comms-service: 3007
- oversight-service: 3010

item.name: 🔑 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — all public (no JWT required)

item.name: � Auth — 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication)
item.description:
Two-factor authentication endpoints.

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented in auth-service. Add to AuthController when building 2FA support.

Recommended library: `otplib` (TOTP) + `qrcode` for QR generation.

item.name: 🖥️ Auth — Session & Device Management
item.description:
Active session and trusted device management.

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented. Sessions table exists in auth-service DB schema.

Requires reading from `sessions` table with user_id filter.

item.name: 💼 Auth — Account Management
item.description:
Account security and lifecycle management.

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented.

- Change password requires current password verification
- Account deletion should be soft-delete with 30-day grace period

item.name: 🔗 Auth — Social Account Linking
item.description:
Link/unlink social providers to an existing account (separate from OAuth login).

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented. `social_accounts` table already exists in the DB schema.

Allows one user to have both email/password AND Google/Facebook auth.

item.name: 🪄 Auth — Magic Link (Passwordless)
item.description:
Email-based passwordless login via one-time magic links.

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented.

Flow: user enters email → receives email with link → clicks link → gets JWT token.

item.name: 🍎 Auth — Apple Sign In
item.description:
Apple OAuth for web and mobile (required for iOS apps).

⚠️ FUTURE FEATURE — Routes not yet implemented. Requires Apple Developer account and `passport-apple` or `apple-signin-auth` npm package.

}

}

item.name: 📝 Proposals
item.description: Provider proposals for requests — requires JWT

item.name: 🛡️ Admin
item.description: Admin operations — requires JWT + admin role

item.name: ⚙️ Infrastructure
item.description: Infrastructure service — events, background jobs, feature flags, rate limits. Routes: /api/v1/events, /background-jobs, /feature-flags, /rate-limits

item.name: 🏥 Health
item.description: Health check endpoints — no auth required

item.name: 🔗 Direct Service Access
item.description: Direct access to each microservice (bypassing API Gateway — for development only)
